body:
Where design meets fashion and craftsmanship 

Inspired by the original Soriana—crafted in 1969 by Afra & Tobia Scarpa and honoured with the Compasso d’Oro—this exclusive piece, in collaboration with Roy Roger’s®, is made of premium Japanese selvedge denim. Crafted on traditional shuttle looms with long-fibre American cotton, its fabric boasts a distinctive white border with a red thread and features hand-finished stone wash details. A bold copper metal brace, echoing the look of vintage rivets, lends it a striking finish.

Soriana by Afra & Tobia Scarpa – Cassina, denim crafted by Roy Roger’s ®

#Cassina #TobiaScarpa #Soriana #RoyRogers
Video credits: @royrogers_official

body:
A revolutionary story of industrial expertise, design culture and Italian know-how. In 1927, the convergence of Le Corbusier’s innovative theory, Pierre Jeanneret’s technical knowledge and Charlotte Perriand’s creative energy gave birth to a new modern aesthetic. The collection became an international success thanks to Cesare Cassina’s intuitions. 

Cassina continues to honour the legacy of these icons by re-editing them in close collaboration with the heirs, foundations, and leading design experts, always remaining true to the original values of each piece.

Watch the full documentary on YouTube - link in bio.

Starring

Cassina and Formafantasma reinterpret the legacy of the Le Corbusier®, Pierre Jeanneret®, Charlotte Perriand® Collection in contemporary times.

‘Staging Modernity’ celebrates the 60th anniversary of the Le Corbusier®, Pierre Jeanneret®, Charlotte Perriand® Collection through a powerful installation and performance—an invitation to question through an innovative approach the ideals of the past and explore their relevance today.
